dine_in_peace_and: Dine in peace and privacy at one of Daimasu's many minimalist private rooms which are perfect for business meetings, family gatherings, and dates.
at_the_restaurant: At the restaurant, they value the concept of omotenashi, which in Japanese is an expression denoting hospitality and mindfulness.
with_this_in_mind: With this in mind, their chefs take great pride in providing diners with clean, simple, produce-driven, and delicious Japanese fare.
the_concept_of_omotenashi: The concept of omotenashi is taken down to the details of their service, promising guests return-worthy experiences time and time again.
authentic_japanese_coastal_cuisine: Authentic Japanese Coastal Cuisine, Now in the Philippines
welcome_to_daimasu: Welcome to Daimasu—Where Tradition Meets Taste. Each dish reflects time-honored Japanese craftsmanship, blending authentic flavors with modern elegance for a truly memorable dining experience.
at_daimasu_we_bring: Japan, brought quietly to your table.
our_name_meaning_great: Daimasu — "great celebration" — is an intimate Japanese house in Makati. Each evening, the chef composes a course around the day's finest seafood and produce flown from Japan. The room seats few; every dish is built for the guest in front of it.
every_dish_at_daimasu: The kitchen works in the discipline of traditional Japanese cooking: knife technique honed over years, a curated sake list selected by hand, and a respect for season that quietly determines the menu. Nothing on the counter exists without intention.
at_daimasu_we_believe: Omotenashi is not a service standard — it is the assumption that the meal began the moment you decided to come. Our team learns your name, your seat, your pace. The evening unfolds at the rhythm of the room, never the rhythm of a turn.
join_us_at_daimasu: Join us at Daimasu, and discover why every meal here is more than food—it's a celebration of culture, care, and culinary artistry.
enjoy_comfortable_rooms_designed: Enjoy comfortable rooms designed to transport you to Japan—where subtle details, traditional touches, and serene ambiance come together to create an authentic cultural experience.
experience_elevated_privacy_and: Experience elevated privacy and comfort in our VIP Room, designed to accommodate up to 8 guests. With refined interiors and a serene ambiance, it's the ideal setting for intimate celebrations, business meals, or special occasions. Let our attentive team ensure every detail is handled with care, creating a seamless and memorable dining experience.
immerse_yourself_in_the: Immerse yourself in the elegance of tradition within our Tatami Room, a sanctuary of understated luxury. Appointed with the handcrafted woven straw flooring and refined Japanese decor, this exclusive space offers a serene escape for those seeking a truly authentic and elevated dining experience. Ideal for private gatherings, it embodies the essence of omotenashi—Japan's highest form of hospitality—with grace and quiet sophistication.
our_cozy_dining_space: Our cozy dining space, with seating for up to 6 guests, offers a warm and inviting atmosphere perfect for relaxed meals and intimate conversations. Thoughtfully designed with subtle Japanese accents, it's ideal for small group gatherings or quiet dinners.
experience_the_artistry_of: Experience the artistry of Japanese cuisine at our exclusive Sushi Counter, thoughtfully designed to seat up to 11 guests. Witness master chefs craft each piece with precision and elegance, delivering an immersive dining experience that honors tradition and seasonality. Ideal for private gatherings this setting reflects the spirit of omakase and omotenashi—where every detail is curated with grace and hospitality.
the_bar_counter_seats: The Bar Counter seats up to 12 guests and blends a vibrant ambiance with refined Japanese style. Whether you're enjoying handcrafted cocktails of light bites, it's the perfect spot to unwind, socialize, and savor the spirit of modern Japanese hospitality.
enjoy_our_array_of: Each evening's courses are composed by the chef around the day's finest ingredients flown from Japan and presented to you in person.
menu_interim_title: An Evening Composed for the Day
menu_interim_body: Daimasu does not publish a fixed menu. Each evening, the chef builds a course around the day's finest seafood and seasonal produce flown from Japan. Reservations open the menu — your seat, your evening, your invitation.
menu_hero_lead: Each evening, the chef composes plates around seafood flown daily from Japan and the season's finest produce. Please consider the menu and kaiseki courses below before reserving.
menu_kaiseki_intro: A multi-course composition built around the day's catch and the season. Reservations required at least two days in advance.
a_quiet_journey: A Quiet Journey, A Table Beyond Time
drawn_close_by_care: Drawn Close by Care, Immersed in Taste
rooms_hero_description: Each room offers a sanctuary from the outside world, where comfort is felt in every detail. Soft lighting, thoughtful design, and serene surroundings create a space to relax, savor, and connect. Here, time slows, allowing each dish and every conversation to be truly enjoyed.
tatami_rooms_tagline_1: On the tatami, time flows quietly
hero_description: Seafood, wagyu, and seasonal produce flown from Japan, prepared with the precision and restraint of authentic Japanese cuisine — an intimate counter for those who recognise the difference.
tatler_description: Luxury and comfort meet in every detail, creating a refined and immersive dining experience.
art_description: Our seasonal selections change with nature's rhythm. Each dish showcases ingredients at their peak, crafted with the essence of Japan's bounty.
sake_description: Every bottle in our collection carries the essence of its brewery, the season, and the craft. Carefully selected, each sake harmonizes with your meal, creating a flowing, unforgettable experience from the first sip to the last.
quiet_description: Step into a serene space where every detail is designed for calm and connection. Here, the seasons unfold gently on each plate, and every moment is meant to be savored in quiet elegance.
membership_description: A symbol of access to Daimasu's most sought-after experiences—priority reservations, exclusive privileges, and elevated dining moments reserved for members.
about_hero_subtitle: An intimate Japanese house in Makati.
about_hero_description: Tatler Best Restaurants Philippines. A small counter, attentive service, and an evening composed around the day's finest ingredients flown from Japan.
membership_page_hero_subtitle: Make Daimasu Your Second Dining Table
membership_page_hero_description: Daimasu Premium Reserve offers exclusive access and personalized service. Enjoy priority reservations and seasonal, curated menus. Every visit becomes an intimate celebration of Japanese culinary artistry.
program_concept_description: A membership-based premium deposit program designed for Daimasu, which values the spirit of Omotenashi (Japanese hospitality) above all else, to forge strong bonds with true loyal customers and establish a stable revenue base.
choose_tier_subtitle_line_2: each offering exceptional value and VIP treatment
card_chefs_special_desc: Exclusive access to chef consultations and bespoke menu creations
card_priority_reservation_desc: Permanent guarantee of table availability, even on the busiest days
card_bottle_keep_desc: Complimentary sake and shochu bottle storage for your visits
card_chauffeur_desc: Free or discounted transportation within Makati and BGC area
step_deduct_desc: Your dining expenses are deducted from your deposit balance (including bonus).
step_discount_desc: Even after your deposit balance reaches zero, your grade-specific dining discount continues as long as your membership is valid.
step_topup_desc: You can top up your deposit anytime with the same bonus percentage (minimum PHP 10,000).
info_topup: Deposit can be topped up anytime with the same bonus percentage
info_no_expiry: Deposit balance has no expiration date
info_membership_valid: Membership valid for 1 year (no automatic renewal)
ready_to_join_desc: Each grade has limited slots. Register now to experience Daimasu's exceptional hospitality.
seo_default_title: Daimasu — Authentic Japanese Restaurant in Makati
seo_default_description: Tatler Dining 2024 Philippines awardee. Authentic omakase, sushi, sashimi and wagyu in Makati, with ingredients flown directly from Japan.
seo_keywords: Japanese restaurant Makati, omakase Manila, authentic Japanese cuisine Philippines, Daimasu, sushi Makati, kaiseki, Tatler Dining 2024, wagyu Manila, private dining Makati
seo_home_description: Premium seafood, wagyu, and artisanal ingredients flown from Japan. Tatler Dining 2024 awardee in Makati. Reserve a table at Daimasu for omakase, sushi and kaiseki.
seo_menu_title: Menu — Kaiseki Courses & À la Carte | Makati
seo_menu_description: Daimasu's full menu — Kaede, Sakura and Sushi Kaiseki set courses plus à la carte sashimi, wagyu steak, tempura, sushi and seasonal small plates, built around seafood flown daily from Japan. Tatler Dining 2024 awardee in Makati.
seo_rooms_description: VIP rooms, traditional tatami rooms, sushi counter and bar — Daimasu offers serene private dining spaces in Makati for intimate gatherings, business meals and celebrations.
seo_about_description: Daimasu brings the heart of Japan to Makati with omotenashi hospitality and authentic Japanese culinary tradition.
seo_membership_description: Daimasu Premium Reserve — exclusive access, priority reservations and curated seasonal menus reserved for members.
tier_eyebrow: Membership Tiers · 会員グレード
settlement_subtitle: Your membership balance works like a dedicated dining account.
concept_eyebrow: Program Concept · プログラム概要
membership_assurances: Our four promises to every member
